commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed for fail-closed restart semantics, dirty head refresh, and current-head proof; there is no narrow automation repair to choose.; Cleared: The diff adds no dependency, workflow, secret-handling, or supply-chain changes; it narrows agent config mutation behavior but still needs compatibility/availability sign-off. (sha=88a1c53abe9ccfc225ab9e4a0afd9924dd6ea4ac)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local config.get preflight before agent-triggered gateway restart, adds regression coverage for invalid/unreadable config and protected media-model routing, and includes incidental Bonjour comment/lint-suppression updates.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +105. Total +139 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source comparison: current main schedules the restart without a config snapshot preflight, while the PR head adds refusal paths for invalid or unreadable snapshots. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for fail-closed restart semantics, dirty head refresh, and current-head proof; there is no narrow automation repair to choose.

target.title: fix(agents): harden gateway config self-edits
target.body:
Summary:
- Keep agent-facing gateway config self-edits within the existing narrow trust boundary; global media/model routing remains operator-owned.
- Validate the local gateway config snapshot before scheduling a restart, refusing restart when the snapshot cannot be loaded or is invalid.
- Add regression coverage for restart preflight failures, caller gateway override isolation, and protected media model routing fields.

Tests:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-gateway-tool.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/tools/gateway-tool-guard-coverage.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.ts

## Real behavior proof

Redacted TencentCloud OpenClaw gateway check after operator-owned config repair and restart:

```text
# time
2026-06-04T21:18:36+08:00
# user service
active
MainPID=1782296
ActiveState=active
SubState=running
# listening
127.0.0.1:10130
[::1]:10130
# sanitized config model routing
agents.defaults.model.primary = custom/mimo-v2.5-pro
agents.defaults.model.fallbacks = [deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash]
agents.defaults.imageModel.primary = custom/mimo-v2-omni
### Protected media routing self-edit rejection

Ran against a temporary isolated gateway using the patched checkout. Token and temp paths redacted.

```text
# commit
526a37f2
# proof target
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19077
# attempted agent gateway self-edit
{ agents: { defaults: { imageModel: { primary: "custom/mimo-v2-omni", fallbacks: [] } } } }
# result
REJECTED
# error
gateway config.patch cannot change protected config paths: agents.defaults.imageModel.fallbacks, agents.defaults.imageModel.primary
### Invalid local config restart refusal

Ran against a temporary isolated gateway using the patched checkout. Token, IP/path details, and temp directory are redacted.

```text
# commit
526a37f2
# proof target
temporary isolated gateway on loopback port 19078
# temporary config mutation
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=[REDACTED]/openclaw.json
wrote invalid config: { gateway: { port: "not-a-number" } }
# attempted agent gateway restart
# result
RESTART_REFUSED
# error
Refusing to restart because the config snapshot cannot be loaded: Invalid config at [REDACTED]/openclaw.json:
- gateway.port: Invalid input: expected number, received string. Fix the config first with `openclaw config validate` or `openclaw doctor --fix`.
target.author: daozheyuanxi
